name: add_sqlite_migrations_go
avoid: do not use go-migrate if project uses another tool
brief_template:
To add SQLite migrations to a Go project:
1. Choose migration tool: golang-migrate, sqlc, or manual
2. Create migrations/ directory with timestamped .up.sql and .down.sql files
3. Wire migration runner into main.go or cmd/ startup
4. Ensure foreign keys are enabled: _pragma=foreign_keys(1)
5. Add integration test that runs migrations on :memory: DB
